identity.description: Specifies the identity type and configuration for the CDN Front Door profile, supporting system-assigned, user-assigned, or both.

log_scrubbing_rule.description: Defines the log scrubbing rule configuration for the Azure Front Door Profile, specifying how sensitive data should be masked or scrubbed in logs.

name.description: Specifies the name of the CDN Front Door profile, which must be unique within the resource group and adhere to Azure naming conventions.

response_timeout_seconds.description: Specifies the time, in seconds, to wait for a response from the origin before timing out. Must be between 1 and 300 seconds.

sku_name.description: Specifies the pricing tier of the CDN Front Door profile. Valid values are 'Standard_AzureFrontDoor' or 'Premium_AzureFrontDoor'.

tags.description: Key-value pairs for resource tagging to organize and categorize the profile; supports Azure Resource Manager tags.

timeouts.description: Specifies the timeouts for creating, updating, and deleting the CDN Front Door profile.
